description:
A tag policy defines a tag key together with the rules that govern how it can
 be used, including the optional set of allowed values. Assigning a governed
 tag to an entity is done through the EntityTagAssignments API.

created_at.description:
Time at which this tag policy was created, in epoch milliseconds.
 Output only.

description.description: User-provided free-form text description of the tag policy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the tag policy. Output only; assigned by the server.

tag_key.description: The key of the governed tag.

updated_at.description:
Time at which this tag policy was last updated, in epoch milliseconds.
 Output only.

values.description:
When empty, the governed tag does not restrict the values that may be
 assigned.
values.title: The set of allowed values for the governed tag.

title: A governed tag definition (tag policy).

portal.tags.v1.TagPolicy.schema.json.title: A governed tag definition (tag policy).

portal.tags.v1.Value.schema.json.description: An allowed value for a governed tag.

name.description: The name of the allowed value.

portal.tags.v1.Value.schema.json.title: Value
